model.name: Gamma-Poisson + Monte Carlo group advancement
model.language: Bayesian teaching approximation, not betting advice
model.prior: Team attack/defense goal rates use Gamma priors derived from historical World Cup Elo-style ratings and squad caps/goals.
model.likelihood: Observed 2026 goals are treated as Poisson counts.
model.posterior: Posterior means update as completed match scores appear in the source JSON.
limitations: No proprietary live event feed is used.
Player-level minutes, injuries and tactical lineups are not modeled unless added to the sheet/API.
Knockout champion probability is a rough educational index, not a full bracket simulation.

official_reference.name: FIFA World Cup 2026 official site
official_reference.note: Used as official reference for tournament context; automated cache uses open reproducible data sources.

fifa_archive.name: FIFA World Cup archive
fifa_archive.note: Official archive reference for past tournaments. Structured app data is regenerated from OpenFootball JSON.

flag_icons.name: flag-icons
flag_icons.note: SVG flags used as visual aids for teams/countries. The frontend maps each team to a reviewed flag code.

wikimedia_commons.name: Wikimedia Commons
wikimedia_commons.note: Player photos are shown only when a curated frontend manifest records source, author and license.

wikidata_licensing.name: Wikidata licensing
wikidata_licensing.note: Reference for reusable structured metadata and rights context.

statsbomb_open_data.name: StatsBomb Open Data
statsbomb_open_data.note: Candidate source for historical event data such as passes, shots and lineups. Terms require attribution and license review before model integration.

wyscout_figshare_events.name: Soccer match event dataset
wyscout_figshare_events.note: Open academic event dataset including FIFA World Cup 2018, with passes, shots, fouls, positions and player/action metadata.

api_football_fixture_statistics.name: API-Football fixture statistics
api_football_fixture_statistics.note: Candidate API for 2026 fixture statistics such as shots on goal, shots off goal and related live match metrics. Requires API key and redistribution review.

football_data_org_api.name: football-data.org API
football_data_org_api.note: Candidate API for fixtures, teams, standings, scorers and related competition data. Coverage and license must be checked before integration.
